race.comment: BOTTLES OF SHELLS (5) is fitter for two runs back and looks to have a good background for this. Fifth fresh at Doomben then safely held last time on the Gold Coast on rain-affected ground. This suits and blinkers are added. EXCESS CAPITAL (2) placed here two back then was fourth at Dalby last time. Better than that and expected to bounce back. DON'T DOUBT SOPHIE (6) made an encouraging debut last time out, finishing 2.5 lengths from the winner in third over 860m at this track. Improver worth including. PIERABELLA (10) is a filly by Pierata making her debut. Fitter for two recent trials and drawn for a good run.
